programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Vollmer, a small-time neo-Nazi, takes advice from a shadowy benefactor on how to increase his followers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group out of Atlanta; the group is stopped by a threat unlike anything anyone has seen before; the search for someone who has gone missing.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick discovers a possible safe haven; Shane must go on a dangerous mission to get needed medical supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group awaits Shane's return; Shane finds himself trapped in a school; Daryl and Andrea search for someone in the woods.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane makes a deadly sacrifice that inspires unusual behavior and self-distancing; the rest of the group struggles to find the balance between living to die and dying to live.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the other survivors continue searching for Sophia; Hershel disagrees with the group's plan and tells them they are only welcome at the farm temporarily.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn knows too much for his comfort level; Daryl finds a sign of life and tries to make it back to the farm alive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Secrets are told and revealed; Hershel refuses to acknowledge the world's new reality; Andrea comes out of her shell; everything is food for something.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con pocas provisiones, y sin poder confiar en la gente a su alrededor, Rick lidera una misión donde el riesgo podría ser mucho mayor que la recompensa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a un grupo de personas despreciables, Rick y sus compañeros deberán idear un plan para obtener una ventaja decisiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En este episodio conoceremos a otro grupo de sobrevivientes. Pero lo que parece seguro y agradable por fuera tiene también un lado oscuro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Nuevos problemas generan nuevas disputas en el grupo durante una misión. ¿Conseguirán superar las diferencias y sobrevivir a este desafío?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En una heroica misión de rescate, algunos miembros del grupo deben volver a un lugar familiar. El escenario será tan grande como el riesgo de la misión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atareado con la resistencia en la iglesia y con una misión de rescate, el grupo podría colapsar. ¿Será este un punto de ruptura para los sobrevivientes?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las reglas y la moral son dejadas de lado a causa de nuevos enemigos. Rick intentará conseguir un acuerdo pacífico, pero ellos podrían preferir la violencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de todas las dificultades que el grupo enfrentó, un pequeño desvío podría ser la solución que buscaban.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La vida a la intemperie dejó al grupo golpeado y atormentado. ¿Serán capaces de continuar esa marcha penosa? ¿Son siquiera las mismas personas que alguna vez fueron?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Durante una tormenta espectacular, Rick y el grupo conocen a unas personas aparentemente amistosas. ¿Serán dignas de confianza, o solo intentan manipular a Rick?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Adaptarse a un nuevo estilo de vida resulta difícil para el grupo. Quizás la vida en la carretera haya sido demasiado traicionera para que vuelvan a ser lo que alguna vez fueron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo continúan la adaptación a su nuevo entorno. ¿Serán capaces de volver a la normalidad? O mejor aún, ¿qué es lo normal ahora?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo enfrentan desafíos que ponen en riesgo su vida mientras intentan que su nuevo hogar sea un lugar seguro. ¿Valdrá realmente la pena esa nueva utopía?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre, poco a poco, que la vida en su refugio empieza a replicar las adversidades que enfrentaron afuera. ¿Podrá Rick soportarlo?

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon find the evil Dr. Loveless' "corpse," then encounter a fictitious but deadly uncle.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon battle bandits and counter-revolutionaries to recover a prize stallion.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon hunt for a Samurai sword so valuable that its theft could lead to America's loss of grace with the Japanese government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon brave fires and explosions while following clues to the murder of a rich Kansas rancher.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to circumvent the theft of Montezuma's treasure by a phony archeological expedition.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Agents James West and Artemus Gordon attempt to stem a tide of counterfeit currency.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West and Artemus Gordon must stop a gargantuan cannon that has turned one town into dust and is now aimed at Denver.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon help a frightened sheriff defend his town against an attack by an army of cutthroats.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to stop a territorial governor who runs his domain with dictatorial power.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James West and Artemus Gordon join a wagon train of entertainers in their search for a mysterious assassin.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon work to avert the destruction of the American Cotton industry.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Flitch beams are installed. Kevin tours the Laminated Veneer Lumber Factory. Richard finds a rear-mounted toilet and the homeowners formulate a landscape plan.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Porch piers are fitted, and the homeowners explore kitchen cabinet options. Tommy vacuums the old insulation while Norm resizes a door for the kids' bath.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The mudroom foundation is laid. Tommy builds a custom bay window. Norm watches window restoration. Tommy puts in another beam to open up the front entryway.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard creates an HVAC plan. An excavation crew replaces a water line and brick is laid for the porch. Tommy protects the mudroom against moisture and critters, while the homeowners pick a bathroom.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and Katherine look at antiques for the Belmont Victorian. HVAC expert Brian Palen snakes ductwork through the house. Tommy frames the porch and shows Kevin how he built the stairs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and the homeowners look at samples of the Belmont Victorian exterior paint scheme. The tub is restored. An electrician wires the new master suite, and Tommy makes new molding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva lays the front at the Belmont Victorian. Katherine selects lighting fixtures while Tommy solves the ice dam issue. A gas fireplace and shingles are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy makes a mudroom-porch window. The homeowners select paint. Tommy clads the porch piers in shingles. Marble tile is laid in the master bath. Tommy builds floors in the kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy finishes the front porch. Kevin visits Vermont to see an artisan create a custom floorcloth for the kitchen. Tommy builds the porch railings. Kevin builds a treehouse for the kids.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm builds a ladder for the treehouse while Tommy lays decking, and Kevin fits balusters. The shingles are prepped for paint. Tommy fits a storm window, finishes the mudroom, and patches flooring.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replants the trees and shrubs. The backyard and treehouse are completed. Norm meets a craftsman who carves newel posts. Tommy and Kevin install kitchen cabinets. The marble countertop is fitted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tommy build a divider for storage. Richard reviews the mechanical systems. A special primer is used in the kitchen. Kevin learns about window treatments. Tommy goes through his punch list.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger finishes the landscape. Tommy makes disguised PVC floor registers. Richard installs the storm windows. The house is revealed, and everyone celebrates the renovated home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new project begins a traditional farmhouse in Massachusetts, built in a factory 200 miles away.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin visit the Vermont factory where the house is built. Richard meets Ed Akerley, who blasts rock to make room for the foundation. Norm and Erik watch Scott McKenzy lay the foundation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: An inspector checks the foundation as a perimeter drain is installed. The framing process begins. An architect explains her landscape plan to make the property look antique.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin sees the plan for the living/dining room and the roof. After framing the house, the crew moves to the garage. Exterior trim arrives. Kevin learns how to attach the fascia board to the rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Erik lays shingles on the roof. Kevin learns colonial roof making. In Vermont, Kevin sees handcrafted light fixtures. Window installation begins. Norm heads to Maine to search for salvaged doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Drilling begins on a geothermal system. Norm visits first-period homes. Kevin tours a factory where the stairs and panels are built. On the North Shore, he learns of a new technology to seal ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps install clapboard siding. Roger selects salvaged granite. Richard discusses the insulation plan and sees how the geothermal pipes are connected. Kevin watches the cabinets come together.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps fit the cabinets. Work starts on the driveway. Granite is used for a patio. The den gets wainscoting. The homeowners select interior paint colors. Erik installs the factory-made staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The staircase is finished. Richard shows the system for getting well water. A backup generator is installed. Kevin learns to fit a reproduction lantern. Kim turns a mud pit into a beautiful front yard.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin builds a custom closet. Norm and Tommy see Kristina's designs. Richard shows Kevin the geothermal system. Kevin gets a tour of the second floor. The team celebrates another job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Norm, Roger, Richard, and Tommy are back in Arlington—this time at an early English-style Arts and Crafts house built in 1909.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The design process kicks off. Old plaster walls are carefully demolished. Landscape plans and Roger begins removing the old Silver Maple. Kevin and Tommy bring down the exterior back wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a 100-year-old wooden beam with a new steel one. The tank gets removed by a specialist. The old concrete from the foundation gets transported to a recycling center.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new concrete foundation is poured. Finding mature specimen trees for the yard. A precast concrete bulkhead is installed. The old rubble foundation gets waterproofed with synthetic rubber spray.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy forges a boot blade and makes wooden stools for his kitchen.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Derek From Malden joins Jimmy for a design inspired by fellow Maker Paul Jackman.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy forges a latch for his chicken coop and welds a triple-flip work table from steel.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy builds a burrito guillotine and steel gates for his property.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy makes his first canoe, a 15-ft. Ranger, and learns a lot during the build.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy designs a modular tool shed and makes a table from a 13-ft. cedar slab.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy builds a barn-style doghouse and baseboard window seats for his living room.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy makes a custom kitchen table, island top, and bottle openers from old tools.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy and fellow welders share welding tips from beginner to expert.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: The team demonstrates TIG welding techniques, and Jimmy makes a wooden frame toolbox.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy makes a 24-pack beer holder from oak and forges a pair of heavy-duty scissors.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy designs a set of kitchen cabinets for his AGA cooker and welds firepit tools.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy modifies his popular toolbox design and restores a cast iron vise grip.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy fixes up a 1977 Chevy pickup that has been idle on his farm for two years.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy builds a new basement door for his 1790 farmhouse.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy handcrafts a double-chambered blacksmith bellows for his forge.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy machines a metal mortar and pestle and makes a foam fathead.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy and his brother Joe rehab a 1994 turbo backhoe.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: In part 2, Jimmy welds the step boxes and reshapes the front loader grab hooks.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy makes a leather bucket bag and recycled walnut-and-plywood-plank side tables.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy recaps the last 11 months of rebuilding the front porch of his 1790 farmhouse.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: In part 2, Jimmy installs eucalyptus wood tongue-and-groove decking.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Jiro's schoolmate Shiro became a liar ever since his father died in an accident. He claimed that his father was killed by monster Eledortus, something that nobody believed in. At the same time, a monster with the ability of absorbing electricity appeared.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Saburo Matsumoto and Yukiko Ono grew up together, but Yukiko was going to be married. Saburo felt envious and planned to blow up the yacht in the middle of the shipboard party.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Terochilus ran away from the battle with Ultraman and headed towards the "Silver Castle", the nest built in downtown Tokyo by Terochilus. At the same time, Saburo escaped from the police, took Yukiko away from hospital and hid in the "Silver Castle".

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: The MAT Space Station and Captain Kaji, who is Captain Kato's close friend, was swallowed by the monster Bemstar. Kado gave out orders to attack Bemstar for avenge, but the Great Space Monster from the Crab Nebula is more troublesome than he'd imagined.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Jiro, who is looking after the school's rabbit with his friends during the summer vacation, discovered a meteorite. The meteorite was left at school, but later grew into an invisible giant monster.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Go was investigating the frequently occurred accidents of airplanes. The reason seemed to be the overconcentration of the geomagnetic field in Kumazawa Dam. Monster Magnedon appeared near Kumazawa Dam, and was defeated by MAT.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: A clip of air plant explosion was shown on TV in midnight. The broadcaster was Electric Wave Monster Beakon, who had the ability to absorb electric waves from the sky and send it to monitors all over the world, similar to a broadcasting network.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Captain Kato was transferred to the Space Station. While MAT was waiting to welcome their new captain Ibuki, a conflagration happened in Yumenoshima. On Go's decision, they extinguished the conflagration using extinguishing fluid.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: On a day of total eclipse, Go met a mysterious woman named Junko Nanjo. She predicted that the Big Dipper will disappear and it happened later that night. Junko predicted that the next constellation to be eaten will be the Cancer!

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: A little space monster Kupukupu fell in Shinshu. MAT captures it and decides to destroy it before it grows violent. When they kill it, a young boy Akio gets a fragment of Kupukupu's body and takes it back home.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: It turns out that there is an island-sized meteorite from Planet Zagoras buried under the village, and the village is pulled out by the gravity force caused by the approach of the planet! Worst of all, the meteorite monster Zagoras appeared.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: A space insect made its way to Earth. Days later, incidents of human disappearing happened in the city. MAT started their investigation believing the crime was made by laser gun, but the real criminal was the stag beetle that's popular among the kids!

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Go meets a boxer, Saburo, who is preparing for his final match. Saburo witnesses Go was doing Ultra Kick and pleads with him to coach him on the skill. Meanwhile, Gronken starts rampaging the city, and Hideki rushes to the site with other MAT members.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: A mysterious typhoon finally hit Japan. MAT shot tranquilizing guns to capture the monster, but Varricane regained its power by absorbing electricity from the high-voltage line and summoned a powerful Typhoon!

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Jiro found a locked box at his friend Yoshiko's house and brought it back to his place without permission. Furthermore, Go took it with him during a check on Space Station No. 5, where he eventually forgot about the box and left it.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Jiro and his older brother Ken get lost while going hiking in Mt. Daio. They meet a friendly villager and lodge at his place with geological scientists. Next day, they together visit a graveyard filled with buffalo bones.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Captain Ibuki's daughter, Minako, came to the MAT headquarters with her deaf friend, Teruo. However, Teruo's true identity was Alien Zeran and declared war on Go through telepathy. Go exposed Teruo's identity, but is suspended instead.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: MAT was investigating the frequently occurred earthquakes in Mt. Ryujin. Go went on an investigation for Ryujin Tunnel after knowing the accident happened in the tunnel 10 years ago. An earthquake happened, and Go lost his consciousness in a collapse.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman

programme.title: Return of Ultraman

programme.title: Return of Ultraman

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: MAT was integrating a woman who emitted mysterious radio waves. The woman visited a friend, sucked her blood and escaped. It was found out that the woman was supposed to be dead in a holiday cottage and her body was manipulated by Alien Draculas!

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Disguising himself as a staff of Space Radio Wave Laboratory, Alien Nackle wanted to get Ultraman out of his way of Earth invasion. First, he revived monsters to analyse Ultraman's specs and powers, then he robbed MAT's newly invented gunpowder Saturn Z.

programme.title: Return of Ultraman
programme.desc: Alien Nackle attacked MAT Station V1 with his spaceships. With Saturn Z in hand, he declared attack on Earth and requested unconditional surrender from humans. On the other hand, Ultraman was conveyed to Planet Nackle for execution.

programme.desc: Hideo Tsumura and Yoko Kataoka were a couple who's dedicated to the research of Yetis. When they found a figure that seemed to be a Yeti, Hideo went missing. While Go was asking Yoko about the incident, Hideo came back but had a low body temperature.

programme.title: Ax Men: Old Log New Tricks
programme.desc: In the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby Stanga's jet boat is in desperate need of repair and he needs to find logs to buy a new engine.

programme.title: Ax Men: All's Fair in Loggin' War
programme.desc: Down in the swamps of Louisiana, Shelby Stanga is trying to upgrade his logging empire, so he takes a risk and tries out some new equipment.

programme.title: Ax Men: Don't Cross the Boss
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Rygaard logging has begun to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show.

programme.title: Ax Men: Davi and Goliath
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga is still without his jet boat, but fortunately he has his trusty assistant Davi and his Go-Devil to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old GI Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalog, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep them selves. But when the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day. Meanwhile, Phil and Si accompany Miss Kay on a trip to visit a family grave.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie contemplates re-branding the Duck Commander image, Jase takes issue with having an outsider design their image, so he and the guys create their own new logo and business cards. Meanwhile, Willie and Phil help Bella with her science project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It is a job only a few would dare. This year, four ice road truckers, Hugh, Alex, Rick, and Drew, return from last season to join Arctic veterans as they venture 200 miles north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After just two days in the Arctic, the critical demands of the oil exploration sites are testing the limits of the truckers and their machines. Both the veterans and rookies are delayed in the shop by mechanical failures.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Just five days into the Arctic adventure, Mother Nature is about to strike and wreak havoc on the ice roads. Making matters worse is a report of a trucker who has run off the road and is stranded on the weakest part.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After the storm clears, most of the truckers are ready to roll--all except Rick, who is on the verge of quitting and looks to Hugh for advice. For a second time, Jerry attempts the MGM camp move, including the transport of an expensive 50-ton derrick.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After his accidental transportation to Cybertron, Megatron returns- and he wants to get his hands on an anti-matter formula created on Earth that could mean limitless power for the Decepticons! Bumblebee and Spike race to warn the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons' hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Deep in the “Demon Swamp” on the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing the islanders. Megatron realizes they are an ancient breed of Decepticons, and forms an alliance with these powerful Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack, Sparkplug and Wheeljack reluctantly transfer his consciousness into their experimental robot, Autobot X, to save him.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: With Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, any object in motion can be frozen. Although it may prove valuable in the fight against evil, it may also prove too dangerous to exist…especially once Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, can freeze any object in motion. It could be a valuable tool in the Autobot's fight against evil, but it may also prove to be too dangerous to exist,especially after Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Time portals are opening up all over the world due to the Decepticons having tapped into the mysterious energy on the island. The Autobots have their hands full trying to keep the peace and return everyone and everything to the correct time.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Accused of treason, Mirage sets out on his own to stop the Decepticons and Insecticons, as well as prove himself innocent. But when his plan to play the two evil forces against each other fails, a chain of events is set off where no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots agree to protect the female ninja robot Nightbird, the most advanced human-made robot ever constructed. But when Megatron gets his hands on Nightbird and reprograms her, it's the Autobots who'll need protecting!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots agree to protect the female ninja robot Nightbird, the most advanced human-made robot ever constructed. But when Megatron gets his hands on Nightbird and reprograms her, it's the Autobots who'll need protecting!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap. When the imposter attempts to lead the others deep into a mine containing a substance lethal to Autobots, it becomes a question of which “Prime” is really Prime.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap. When the imposter attempts to lead the others deep into a mine containing a substance lethal to Autobots, it becomes a question of which "Prime" is really Prime.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons discover the lost civilization of Atlantis in the depths of the ocean. Still inhabited, the lost city is led by a king as power-hungry and deceitful as Megatron. The two forces unite and besiege Washington, D.C. with an energy shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor, so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful “Heart of Cybertron.”

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons and Insecticons team up to attack a defense base filled with data that Megatron wants to get his hands on. When the Insecticons connect with the base's energy shield, they unexpectedly grow larger…and potentially explosive!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: With no help from local law enforcement, a writer hires Paladin to find her fiancé; in the roughest gutter on the Barbary coast.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A daughter hires Paladin to help her look for an old friend of his - her mother.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Moses Kadish is an alcoholic. He moves to middle of nowhere to try to stop drinking and drills a well. The well produces whiskey instead of water.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is asked to look for a missing brother, no matter the cost. When he finds out he's been missing for seven years, he accepts this task.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Alfred Nobel, staying at the Carlton, enlists the aid of resident Paladin to recover a mixed up shipment of mineral oil with his more potent nitroglycerin.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: An elder from the Japanese community informs Paladin that a Nationalistic Japanese Priest, accompanied by a Samurai Warrior, is attempting to enter the country illegally.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Tully Coombs wires Paladin. He wants his infamous father to give him 160 acres to start a family.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Gavin O'Shea, revered in his homeland, appeals to any Irishman listening to help by providing money for his cause.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) captures murderer Milo Wade in a border town. He starts the cross-desert trek to Tombstone with his prisoner, but Milo's young brother intercepts the pair, leaving Hollister tied to a tree to die in the broiling sun.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister gives the job of the jailer to Barton Clark who has recently come West. The Sheriff brings Clark his first 'tenant,' a beautiful outlaw known as Rose of Rio Bravo with whom Clark falls in love, leading him to double-cross Hollister.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister rides to collect a prisoner, but the prisoner breaks jail before he arrives. The prisoner saves Hollister from an Apache ambush. But soon Hollister must pit his courage and fast gun against two desperate men.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) decides to go undercover to prevent editor Claibourne (Richard Eastham) from being murdered by a hitman who has been hired by a vengeful, local rancher whom the editor once helped to send to prison.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: As Clay watches the arrival of the stage from Tucson, a shooting down the street diverts his attention, and a $30,000 army payroll is stolen from a cavalry captain on the stage. Wounded and disarmed, he's forced into a battle to solve the crime.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: General amnesty follows the shooting of young Les Tanner by hired killers. Hollister (Pat Conway) cannot arrest the gunmen because of amnesty but he prevents a new flare-up of the feud by arresting the victim's brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Maverick

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
